subcodes.first_line: All the men and women of the world were awaiting the Manifestation of the Divine Revelation and were watchful for the dawning of the Light of the All-Glorious, and when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع رجال و نساء عالم منتظر مظهر ظهور الهی و مترصد اشراق نور صمدانی بودند و چون
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God
